problem_statement: Given an array of integers arr, there is a sliding window of size k which is moving from the very left of the array to the very right. You can only see the k numbers in the window. Each time the sliding window moves right by one position. Return the max sliding window..

examples.explanation:
Window position                   Max
------------------------         -----
[4  0  -1] 3  5  3  6  8           4
 4 [0  -1  3] 5  3  6  8           3
 4  0 [-1  3  5] 3  6  8           5
 4  0  -1 [3  5  3] 6  8           5
 4  0  -1  3 [5  3  6] 8           6
 4  0  -1  3  5 [3  6  8]          8

For each window of size k=3, we find the maximum element in the window and add it to our output array.
Thereâs just one window is size 2 that is possible and the maximum of the two elements is our answer.
